title: High stakes battle in Bhore as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Bhore. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Bhore
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Bhore assembly segment.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Bhore
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Bhore assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
